title: Editing Photos
drDigitalIntro: Photos lets you edit photos without a separate app. Double-click a photo to open the editor. You can crop (change the size or angle), rotate, adjust brightness and contrast, and apply filters. All edits are non-destructive — the original is always saved. Undo changes anytime. Photos editing is perfect for quick adjustments before sharing.
drDigitalSuccess: You can edit photos to make them look better!
drDigitalHint: Edit button is in the top right when viewing a photo.
